mapper.select: select setting_id, user_id, print_type, orientation, paper_width_mm, paper_height_mm, title_font_px, header_footer_font_px, content_font_px, offset_x_mm, offset_y_mm, rows_per_page, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from scm_user_print_setting where user_id = #{userId} and print_type = #{printType} limit 1
mapper.update: update scm_user_print_setting set orientation = #{orientation}, paper_width_mm = #{paperWidthMm}, paper_height_mm = #{paperHeightMm}, title_font_px = #{titleFontPx}, header_footer_font_px = #{headerFooterFontPx}, content_font_px = #{contentFontPx}, offset_x_mm = #{offsetXMm}, offset_y_mm = #{offsetYMm}, rows_per_page = #{rowsPerPage}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where user_id = #{userId} and print_type = #{printType}
